---
title: "Hyperparameter Sensitivity"
---

## Design

- **Goal**: understand how sensitive the model is to key hyperparameters and find the optimal config
- **Claim addressed**: Claim 3 — the method is robust across a reasonable HP range
- **Search tool**: Optuna via `mode=optuna`; [N] trials, TPE sampler, MedianPruner
- **Run command**:

```bash
python -m src.main mode=optuna optuna.n_trials=100 optuna.study_name=hp_study
# Results logged to MLflow and Optuna storage (outputs/optuna/)
```

```{dot}
//| label: fig-hp-design
//| fig-cap: "Hyperparameter search: sampler → trial → pruner → best config"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Sampler [label="TPE Sampler", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Trial   [label="Trial Run"]
  Pruner  [label="MedianPruner", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
  Best    [label="Best Config",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  Sampler -> Trial -> Pruner
  Pruner  -> Best  [label=" survivors", fontcolor="#adb5bd", fontsize=9]
}
```

---

## Hyperparameter Space

| Parameter | Type | Range / Choices | Sampler |
|-----------|------|----------------|---------|
| `lr` | float (log) | [1e-4, 1e-1] | log-uniform |
| `hidden_dim` | int | {64, 128, 256, 512} | categorical |
| `num_layers` | int | [1, 6] | uniform int |
| `dropout` | float | [0.0, 0.5] | uniform |
| `weight_decay` | float (log) | [1e-5, 1e-2] | log-uniform |

```{dot}
//| label: fig-hp-space
//| fig-cap: "Hyperparameter space structure"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.8
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    Arch [label="Architecture",  fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Opt  [label="Optimisation",  fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Reg  [label="Regularisation",fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    H1 [label="hidden_dim\nnum_layers"]
    H2 [label="lr\nweight_decay"]
    H3 [label="dropout\nlabel_smooth"]
  }

  Arch -> H1  Opt -> H2  Reg -> H3
}
```

---

## Results

> Fill in after running. Summarise the most important findings.

### Best Configuration Found

```yaml
# Best trial config (from Optuna)
lr: <value>
hidden_dim: <value>
num_layers: <value>
dropout: <value>
weight_decay: <value>
```

- **Best trial metric**: [value] at trial #[N]
- **Improvement over default config**: [Δ metric]

### Sensitivity Analysis

| Parameter | Low sensitivity | High sensitivity | Interaction with |
|-----------|----------------|-----------------|-----------------|
| `lr` | — | — | `weight_decay` |
| `hidden_dim` | — | — | `num_layers` |
| `dropout` | — | — | dataset size |

```{dot}
//| label: fig-sensitivity
//| fig-cap: "Parameter sensitivity: high impact vs. safe defaults"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.8
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.6, nodesep=0.45]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph col1 {
    rank=same
    HS1 [label="lr (high)",      fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    HS2 [label="hidden_dim\n(medium)", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    LS1 [label="dropout (low)",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph col2 {
    rank=same
    Tune [label="Must Tune"]
    Safe [label="Safe Default"]
  }
  subgraph col3 {
    rank=same
    Cfg [label="Final Config", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }

  HS1 -> Tune  HS2 -> Tune
  LS1 -> Safe
  Tune -> Cfg  Safe -> Cfg
}
```

---

## Robustness Check

- **Stability across seeds**: run best config with seeds {42, 0, 1, 7, 99}; report std
- **Robustness claim**: method achieves [metric] ± [σ] — variance is acceptable for deployment
- **Failure modes**: performance degrades below [lr_min] or above [hidden_dim_max]

```{dot}
//| label: fig-robustness
//| fig-cap: "Robustness: seed variance and failure boundary"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 2.4
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=LR
  graph [ranksep=0.5, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.55, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  Seeds  [label="K Seeds",      fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  Mean   [label="Mean ± Std"]
  CI     [label="95% CI"]
  Claim3 [label="Claim 3\nConfirmed", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]

  Seeds -> Mean -> CI -> Claim3
}
```

---

## Recommended Config

```bash
# Recommended production config derived from HP search
python -m src.main \
  dataset=<dataset> \
  method=<method> \
  method.lr=<best_lr> \
  method.hidden_dim=<best_hidden> \
  method.num_layers=<best_layers> \
  method.dropout=<best_dropout>
```
